name: T-5 ts eval specs: positive and negative fixtures use the .ts extension matching TypeScript source files
command: missing=0; for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/typescript"/g-ts-*; do for kind in positive negative; do [ -d "$d/$kind" ] || continue; n=$(ls "$d/$kind"/*.ts 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "${n:-0}" -ge 1 ] || missing=$((missing+1)); done; done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo ts_extension 1>&2
